message: fix(ci): remove invalid live cache reasoning flag

files.patch:
@@ -77,7 +77,6 @@ async function runToolOnlyTurn(params: {
       sessionId: params.sessionId,
       maxTokens: 128,
       temperature: 0,
-      ...(params.providerTag === "openai" ? { reasoning: "none" as const } : {}),
     },
     `${params.providerTag} tool-only turn`,
     params.providerTag === "openai" ? OPENAI_TIMEOUT_MS : ANTHROPIC_TIMEOUT_MS,
@@ -106,7 +105,6 @@ async function runToolOnlyTurn(params: {
         sessionId: params.sessionId,
         maxTokens: 128,
         temperature: 0,
-        ...(params.providerTag === "openai" ? { reasoning: "none" as const } : {}),
       },
       `${params.providerTag} tool-only retry ${attempt + 1}`,
       params.providerTag === "openai" ? OPENAI_TIMEOUT_MS : ANTHROPIC_TIMEOUT_MS,
@@ -168,7 +166,6 @@ async function runOpenAiToolCacheProbe(params: {
       sessionId: params.sessionId,
       maxTokens: 64,
       temperature: 0,
-      reasoning: "none",
     },
     `openai cache probe ${params.suffix}`,
     OPENAI_TIMEOUT_MS,
